title: RF-DETR: Neural Architecture Search for Real-Time Detection Transformers
summary: RF-DETR is a lightweight detection transformer that uses weight-sharing neural architecture search (NAS) to discover accuracy–latency Pareto-optimal configurations for a target dataset without retraining from scratch. By fine-tuning a pre-trained base and evaluating thousands of configurations, it outperforms prior real-time methods: RF-DETR (nano) reaches 48.0 AP on COCO, and RF-DETR (2x-large) is the first real-time detector to exceed 60 AP on COCO while also beating GroundingDINO (tiny) on Roboflow100-VL at roughly 20x the speed.
